title: Flat Bird Society The Second
description: This is a Create Mod and Ice and Fire centered modpack designed for a smallish youtube SMP
body:
The summary says it all! As I get more into it I will update this more and make it nicer looking, but for the time being, its a mid sized, create and ice and fire focused modpack, being used for a smallish YT SMP.

Due to their Licencing, Copyright, and Preferences, Twilight Forest cannot be officially included in this modpack for re-distrobution. If you would like TF content included in this modpack, please go support them by downloading the latest 1.20.1 release on CurseForge! [Twilight Forest Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
